home.slogan: Generative Learning in Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom

toolbar.webSearchDesc: Search the web for up-to-date information before generation
toolbar.webSearchNoProvider: Configure search API key in Settings
toolbar.configureProviderHint: Configure at least one model provider to generate courses
toolbar.ttsHint: Choose a voice for the AI teacher
toolbar.interactiveModeHint: Enable interactive-first mode for more hands-on content

export.inlinePartial: {{count}} external asset(s) couldn't be bundled; the course may not display correctly offline.

import.pptxSuccess: PPTX parsed successfully ({{count}} slides, output logged to console)

error.invalidZip: Invalid file. Please select a valid .maic.zip file.
error.invalidPptx: Failed to parse PPTX. Please check the file is valid.
error.parserUnavailable: PPTX import is unavailable: the parser bundle is not deployed. Re-run install/sync.
error.invalidManifest: Invalid classroom file: manifest.json is missing or corrupted.
error.missingData: Invalid classroom file: missing required course data.
error.storageFull: Import failed: browser storage is full. Try clearing old classrooms.

chat.startConversation: Type a message below to begin chatting

error.emptyAgentResponses: Agents returned empty responses; discussion stopped. Try again or check your model settings.
error.streamInterrupted: Stream ended unexpectedly; discussion didn't complete. Please try again.

lectureNotes.empty: Notes will appear here after lecture playback
lectureNotes.emptyHint: Press play to start the lecture

stage.confirmSwitchMessage: A topic is currently in progress. Switching scenes will end the current topic. Are you sure?
stage.generatingNextPage: Scene is being generated, please wait...
stage.proModeDisabledHint: Editing isn't available on this page — open a course slide to edit with Pro mode.

conflict.title: Another tab is editing this course
conflict.body: Editing is locked to a single tab to avoid conflicting changes. Close the other tab (or wait for its session to time out) before entering edit mode here.

insert.imageDrop: Drop an image or click to choose a file

quiz.analysisPlaceholder: Shown after the question is graded…
quiz.commentPromptPlaceholder: How should this open response be graded?
quiz.emptyHint: Use the “Add question” button above to create the first one.
quiz.shortAnswerGradingNote: Short answers are always graded by AI from the guidance below.

hint.fewOptions: Question {{n}}: add at least two options
hint.emptyOption: Question {{n}}: an option label is empty

agent.emptyTitle: What would you like to change?
agent.emptyHint: After editing this slide on the canvas, let AI regenerate narration that matches the content.
agent.placeholder: Describe your changes to this slide…

empty.lead: Tell me how to change this slide — I'll redo the content and re-align the narration.
empty.boundary: For fine-grained edits use the editor; add / delete / reorder slides from the left nav.

interactive.emptyTitle: What needs fixing on this page?
interactive.lead: Describe a bug on this interactive page — e.g. a button that does nothing — and I'll fix just that, keeping everything else.
interactive.placeholder: Describe the bug on this interactive page…
interactive.boundary: I make targeted fixes to the page; I won't rebuild the whole page. Switch scenes from the left nav.

narration.label: Regenerate the narration script
narration.examples: “Make it more conversational”, “Align with my canvas edits”

fixHtml.label: Fix a bug on the page
fixHtml.examples: “The start button does nothing”, “Panels overlap on mobile”

timeline.title: Narration script
timeline.emptyHint: Drag actions onto the axis to start, or let MAIC Agent generate narration.
timeline.discussionTerminalHint: A discussion stays at the end of the scene (one per scene)

picker.title: Insert action
picker.spotlightDesc: Highlight an element on the canvas
picker.laserDesc: Point a laser at an element
picker.discussionDesc: Pose a question, pick who starts it

pick.pickHint: Click a highlighted element or the list below · Esc to cancel
pick.noElements: No locatable elements on this slide.
pick.bindHint: Click a highlighted element on the canvas to bind

encouragement.low: A good start — review and try again.

whiteboard.title: Interactive Whiteboard
whiteboard.readyHint: Elements will appear here when added by AI

roundtable.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected, please try again

pbl.legacyFormat: This PBL scene uses a legacy format. Please regenerate the course.
pbl.emptyProject: PBL project has not been generated yet. Please create via course generation.

roleSelection.title: Choose Your Role
roleSelection.description: Select a role to start collaborating on the project

chat.title: Project Discussion
chat.mentionHint: Use @question to ask, @judge to submit for review
chat.issueCompleteMessage: Issue "{{completed}}" completed! Moving to next issue: "{{next}}"
chat.allCompleteMessage: 🎉 All issues completed! Great work on the project!

step1.title: Step 1: Choose a Role
step1.desc: After the project is generated, select a role from the list (non-system roles marked with 🟢)

step2.title: Step 2: Complete Issues
step2.desc: Each issue represents a learning task:

s1.title: View current Issue
s1.desc: Check the issue's title, description, and assignee

s2.title: Get guidance
s2.example:
@question Where should I start?
@question How do I implement this feature?
s2.desc: The Question Agent provides guiding questions and hints (no direct answers)

s3.title: Submit your work
s3.example: @judge I'm done, please check my Notes
s3.desc: The Judge Agent evaluates your work and gives feedback:
s3.complete: Automatically moves to the next issue

step3.title: Step 3: Complete the Project
step3.desc: When all issues are done, the system displays "🎉 Project Complete!"

hero.title: Project-Based Learning
hero.resetConfirmDescription: This clears all progress for this project — chat history, submissions, and stage status — and you'll start over from the beginning. This can't be undone.
hero.startHint: Click to enter the workspace. {{name}} will guide you through each stage.
hero.instructorTagline: Guides you through the whole project
hero.scenarioCharacterTagline: The character you'll interact with in the scenario

chat.placeholderCompleted: Project complete. Check out your report.
chat.keyboardHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.choiceOrType: Pick one, or type your own…
chat.suggestionsToggle: Need ideas? See some ways to respond
chat.guidancePointer: Stuck? Check this act's goal and tips in the panel on the right.
chat.evaluatingSubmissionDetail: Task: "{{title}}". Feedback on this submission will appear here once evaluation is complete.
chat.milestoneFeedbackPending: The milestone feedback will appear once ready.
chat.emptyChatHint: Your project walkthrough with {{name}} will start here.
chat.handoverHint: Click "Continue to Next Stage" to keep going.

milestoneCard.title: Milestone Review
milestoneCard.continueHint: Click Continue to enter the next stage.
milestoneCard.projectAlmostDone: 🎉 Project almost done — awaiting completion report

briefing.intro: The premise introduced during prep — kept here so you can revisit it anytime in the scene.

submission.fileTooLarge: File exceeds 5 MB limit. Try splitting or compressing.
submission.pdfNoText: No extractable text found in this PDF.
submission.imageTooLargeNoStorage: Image too large to attach without storage configured (max 2 MB locally).
submission.imageNeedsCaptionNoVision: The current model can't read images. Add a text description of the image before submitting, or switch to a vision-capable model in Settings.
submission.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Only text files (.txt, .md, .csv, .json, .py, …) and PDF are accepted.
submission.pastePlaceholder: Paste your code, document, answer — or an image / screenshot — here…
submission.uploadPlaceholder: Uploaded content will appear here. Edit before submitting…
submission.imageCaptionPlaceholder: Add an optional caption for this image…
submission.cancelProcessingConfirm: A file is still being processed. Cancel and discard this upload?
submission.lockedWhileStreaming: The instructor is replying — please wait before submitting.
submission.selectFileHint: Choose a file · Max 5 MB · Text, PDF or image

agentTabs.noAgent: No AI agent configured for this project.

completion.noWhatsNext: The final evaluation hasn't been written yet.
completion.title: Completion Report
completion.summary: You completed {{completed}} of {{total}} tasks across {{stages}} stages.
completion.stageNoData: No recorded output in this stage.

scenario.summary: You completed all {{acts}} acts of this scenario. Here's how the role-play went.
scenario.goalReviewHint: This scenario set a few key goals for each act. Here's a look back at how your conversation actually went — you met {{achieved}} of {{total}} this time.
scenario.goalListTitle: What each act asked of you
scenario.goalListHint: This scenario set a few key goals for each act. Here's a look back at what each act asked you to do.

highlight.independence: You demonstrated {{unlocks}}/{{total}} concepts on your own — no prompting needed. Solid understanding.
highlight.resilience: In "{{title}}" you overcame {{errors}} errors, tackling each one — real grit.
highlight.resilienceGeneral: You overcame {{errors}} errors, tackling each one — real grit.
highlight.completion: You completed every task. Steady progress all the way through.

completionCard.title: Project Complete · Completion
completionCard.subtitle: Congratulations! You finished the entire project.
completionCard.description: Based on your performance data (time spent, conversations, error recovery, concepts unlocked…), we have generated a completion report showing what you built, what you learned, and where to go next.

upload.courseMaterialSizeLimit: Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, and Markdown files up to 50MB
upload.generateFailed: Failed to generate classroom, please try again
upload.requirementPlaceholder:
Tell me anything you want to learn, e.g.
"Teach me Python from scratch in 30 minutes"
"Explain Fourier Transform on the whiteboard"
"How to play the board game Avalon"
upload.fileTooLarge: File too large. Please select a file smaller than 50MB
upload.unsupportedCourseMaterial: Unsupported course material type. Please upload PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, or Markdown.

generation.outlineEditorStreamingWaiting: Waiting for the first scene to arrive…

generation.dragSceneHint: Drag to reorder; or focus and press Ctrl/⌘ + ↑ / ↓
generation.webSearchingDesc: Searching the web for up-to-date information
generation.jumpToBlankTitle: Jump to a section that still needs a title

settings.title: Settings
settings.ttsModelPlaceholder: Enter or select TTS model name
settings.modelSelectedViaVoice: Model is determined by voice selection
settings.testConnectionDesc: Test current API configuration is available
settings.agentSettingsDesc: Select the agents to participate in the conversation. Select 1 for single agent mode, select multiple for multi-agent collaborative mode.
settings.agentModeAutoDesc: AI will automatically generate appropriate roles
settings.autoAgentCountDesc: Number of agents to auto-generate (including teacher)

agentDescriptions.default-1: Lead teacher with clear and structured explanations
agentDescriptions.default-2: Supports learning and helps clarify key points
agentDescriptions.default-3: Brings humor and energy to the classroom
agentDescriptions.default-4: Always curious, loves asking why and how
agentDescriptions.default-5: Diligently records and organizes class notes
agentDescriptions.default-6: Thinks deeply and explores the essence of topics

settings.addProviderDescription: Add custom model providers to extend available AI models
settings.deleteProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
settings.addCustomAudioProviderDescription: Add a custom OpenAI-compatible audio provider
settings.defaultModelHint: Model name sent in API requests (e.g. kokoro, tts-1)
settings.noVoicesAdded: No voices added yet. Add voices below for per-agent selection.
settings.noModelsAdded: No models added yet. Add models below to enable model selection.
settings.noModelsWarning: Please add at least one model below before using this provider.
settings.asrNoTranscription: No transcription generated. Try speaking louder or longer.
settings.resetToDefaultDescription: Restore model list to default configuration (API key and Base URL will be preserved)
settings.resetConfirmDescription: This will remove all custom models and restore the built-in default model list. API key and Base URL will be preserved.
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings, please try again
settings.modelsManagementDescription: Manage the models and capabilities available for this provider.
settings.step1ConfigureProvider: Go to "Model Providers", select or add a provider, and configure connection settings (API key, Base URL, etc.)
settings.step2SelectModel: Select the model you want to use in "Active Model" below
settings.step3StartUsing: After saving, the system will use your selected model
settings.activeModelDescription: Select the model for AI conversations and content generation
settings.configureProvidersFirst: Please configure provider connection settings in "Model Providers" on the left
settings.asrDescription: ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) - Convert speech to text
settings.ttsEnabledDescription: When enabled, speech audio will be generated during course creation
settings.ttsVoiceConfigHint: Per-agent voice can be configured in "Classroom Role Config" on the homepage
settings.asrEnabledDescription: When enabled, students can use microphone for voice input
settings.browserNativeNote: Browser Native ASR requires no configuration and is completely free
settings.voxcpmBaseUrlPending: Enter a Base URL to generate the request URL
settings.voxcpmAutoVoiceNoPreview: Auto Voice is generated from agent context and cannot be previewed directly
settings.voxcpmVoicesDescription: Saved in this browser and added to the shared Agent Bar voice pool.
settings.voxcpmAutoVoicePrivacyNote: Auto Voice sends the agent persona to your configured VoxCPM backend as the voice prompt.
settings.voxcpmCloneUnsupported: Current backend does not support cloning
settings.voxcpmAutoVoiceDescription: Use the agent persona as the voice prompt
settings.voxcpmCloneUnsupportedDetail: Current backend does not support cloning
settings.voxcpmPromptPlaceholder: Example: clear, natural teacher voice with moderate pace
settings.voxcpmReferenceAudioLimitHint: Reference audio must be 10 MB / 60 seconds or smaller and is converted to WAV before saving.
settings.voxcpmRecordingUnsupported: This browser does not support recording
settings.voxcpmBaseUrlRequired: Enter a VoxCPM Base URL first
settings.browserNativeTTSNote: Browser Native TTS requires no configuration and is completely free, using system built-in voices
settings.asrNotSupported: Browser does not support Speech Recognition API
settings.browserTTSNotSupported: Browser does not support Speech Synthesis API
settings.browserTTSNoVoices: Current browser has no available TTS voices
settings.asrResultPlaceholder: Recognition result will be displayed after recording
settings.ttsTestTextDefault: Hello, this is a test speech.
settings.qwenVoiceNofish: Designer who can't pronounce retroflex sounds
settings.qwenVoiceBella: Little loli who doesn't get drunk
settings.qwenVoiceMia: Gentle as spring water, well-behaved as snow
settings.qwenVoiceMochi: Smart little adult with childlike innocence
settings.qwenVoiceBellona: Loud voice, clear pronunciation, vivid characters
settings.qwenVoiceVincent: Unique hoarse voice telling tales of war and honor
settings.qwenVoiceArthur: Simple voice soaked by years and dry tobacco
settings.qwenVoiceNini: Soft and sticky voice like glutinous rice cake
settings.qwenVoiceEbona: Her whisper is like a rusty key
settings.qwenVoiceSeren: Gentle and soothing voice to help you sleep
settings.qwenVoicePip: Naughty but full of childlike innocence
settings.qwenVoiceStella: Sweet confused girl voice that becomes just when shouting
settings.qwenVoiceAlek: Cold of battle nation, warm under woolen coat
settings.qwenVoiceLenn: Rational German youth who wears suit and listens to post-punk
settings.qwenVoiceAndre: Magnetic, natural and calm male voice
settings.qwenVoiceMarcus: Broad face, short words, solid heart - old Shaanxi taste
settings.lang_th-TH: ไทย (ประเทศไทย)
settings.pdfDescription: Choose PDF parsing engine with support for text extraction, image processing, and table recognition
settings.mineruDescription: MinerU is a commercial PDF parsing service that supports advanced features such as table extraction, formula recognition, and layout analysis.
settings.mineruApiKeyRequired: You need to apply for an API Key on the MinerU website before use.
settings.mineruCostWarning: MinerU is a commercial service and may incur fees. Please check the MinerU website for pricing details.
settings.mineruLocalDescription: MinerU supports local deployment with advanced PDF parsing (tables, formulas, layout analysis). Requires deploying MinerU service first.
settings.mineruApiKeyOptional: Only required if server has authentication enabled
settings.imageGenerationDisabledHint: When enabled, images will be auto-generated during course creation
settings.imageTestPromptDefault: A cute cat sitting on a desk
settings.videoGenerationDisabledHint: When enabled, videos will be auto-generated during course creation
settings.videoTestPromptDefault: A cute cat walking on a desk
settings.videoGenerationWarning: Video generation usually takes 1-2 minutes, please be patient
settings.mediaContentSensitive: Sorry, this content triggered a safety check.
settings.noVisionWarning: Current model does not support vision. Images can still be placed in slides, but the model cannot understand image content to optimize selection and layout
settings.serverConfiguredNotice: This provider is managed by the server and can't be edited here. To use your own credentials, add a separate provider.
settings.ttsProviderEnabledHint: When off, this provider is hidden from the voice picker and never auto-assigned.
settings.ttsProviderUnavailableHint: Configure this provider before enabling it.
settings.ttsProviderDisabledByAdmin: This provider has been disabled by the server administrator and cannot be enabled.
settings.optionalOverride: Optional — leave empty to use server config
settings.modelNotConfigured: Please select a model to get started
settings.clearCacheDescription: Delete all locally stored data, including classroom records, chat history, audio cache, and app settings. This action cannot be undone.
settings.clearCacheConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to clear all cache?
settings.clearCacheConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all of the following data and cannot be recovered:
settings.clearCacheConfirmItems: Classrooms & scenes, Chat history, Audio & image cache, App settings & preferences
settings.clearCacheSuccess: Cache cleared, page will refresh shortly
settings.clearCacheFailed: Failed to clear cache, please try again
settings.webSearchApiKeyHint: Get an API key from the selected search provider
settings.webSearchApiKeyOptional: API key is optional. Without one, public page scraping will be used as a fallback.
settings.baiduSubSourcesDescription: Choose at least one Baidu source to query.
settings.baiduSubSourceWebDescription: General web pages from Baidu AI Search.
settings.webSearchServerConfigured: Server-side search API key is configured
settings.presetPickHint: Picking a provider auto-fills its base URL and protocol; enter your key then click "Fetch Models". Not listed? Use "Custom".
settings.fetchModelsNoEndpoint: This provider has no model list endpoint — add models manually
settings.fetchModelsAuthError: API key is invalid or expired

usage.title: Usage
usage.disclaimer: Usage is system-tracked; only server-side calls are counted.

tokenPlan.title: Token Plan Setup
tokenPlan.desc: Pick your token plan provider and enter the key — it auto-configures every adapted modality (LLM/image/video/speech/web search).
tokenPlan.offeredNote: Models offered by this plan. Pick the ones you want on the generation bar — availability depends on your plan tier, and unsupported models will error at generation time.

settings.ttsBrowserNativeTimelineNotice: Browser-native TTS doesn't support the editor timeline's audio features (preview, regenerate, and bulk voiceover). Switch to a managed TTS provider to generate and manage per-line audio.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself — the AI teacher will personalize lessons for you...
profile.avatarHint: Your avatar will appear in classroom discussions and chats
profile.fileTooLarge: Image too large — please choose one under 5 MB

accessCode.title: Enter Access Code
accessCode.error: Invalid access code. Please try again.
